payload.current_pain: The default source bootstrap correctly rejects the only local database because it still contains Symphony-owned stories, leaving ordinary core change requests without an authoritative writable task state.
payload.notes: Recorded in the US-102 isolated changeset; do not replace the mixed database until the reviewed recovery tuple exists.
payload.predicted_impact: Core changes can bootstrap and record durable intake without bypassing ownership checks or inventing empty state.
payload.suggested_improvement: Publish and document a checksummed core-only epoch reconstructed from reviewed semantic history, then restore it through an explicit non-destructive recovery command.
payload.title: Restore the verified Harness core durable epoch

payload.evidence: Local pre-merge contract and real macOS v0.1.14 upgrade passed; hosted run 29223964557 passed Ubuntu repository/Linux transition and Windows frozen-smoke/upgrade/current-smoke jobs. Actual five-platform v0.1.17 promotion remains merge-gated.

payload.actions_taken: ["reproduced run 29222332569","froze v0.1.14 contract and hashes","added Linux and Windows transition gates","deferred non-force tag promotion until five builds pass","added immutable identity and collision tests","pushed PR 47","monitored hosted run 29223964557"]
payload.decisions_made: ["separate frozen historical proof from current candidate proof","consume but never move v0.1.16","promote v0.1.17 only after exact-SHA five-platform proof"]
payload.errors: ["default core bootstrap refused Symphony-owned rows as designed","Go was unavailable so checksum-verified prebuilt actionlint was used","two CLI shape retries were corrected without state mutation"]
payload.harness_friction: Default bootstrap correctly rejected the stale Symphony-owned database, but no verified core epoch was locally restorable; used an isolated replayable changeset. db rebuild does not accept --json and proof-field story updates cannot use --json, causing two harmless command retries.
payload.notes: PR 47 is open and green. Story remains in_progress until merge triggers and proves the five-platform v0.1.17 promotion. Token estimate is unavailable because the task spanned delegated analysis, local validation, and hosted monitoring.
payload.task_summary: Implemented and hosted-validated post-merge CLI release recovery
